debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∀ (H : Graph α β), H.IsCompOf G → ∃! x, x ∈ H.vertexSet ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)

failed_attempts:
have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Exists.intro (Classical.choose (by
      apply Classical.em
      intro h'
      exact ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff]⟩))
    apply Classical.choose_spec
    apply Classical.em
    intro h'
    exact ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff]⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply Set.Finite.subset (G.vertexSet_finite_of_edgeFinite ?_)
    · apply inferInstance
    · exact hcomp.subset
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    have hx : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) := by
      apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hcomp.nonempty
      exact hx
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hx
    have hiness : G.inessential x := h x
    obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hxMx⟩ := hiness
    have heq : Mx.encard = ν(G) := by
      apply IsMaxMatching.encard hMx
    rw [← heq]
    have hmatch : G.IsMatching Mx := hMx.toIsMatching
    have hsub : V(H) ⊆ V(G) := hcomp.subset
    have hdeg : (G ↾ Mx).MaxDegreeLE 1 := hmatch.maxDegree_le_one
    have hdegH : (H ↾ (Mx ∩ E(H))).MaxDegreeLE 1 := by
      apply MaxDegreeLE.mono
      · apply Subgraph.subgraph_of_subgraph
        · apply Subgraph.edgeSet_mono
          intro e he
          exact Set.inter_subset_left _ _ he
        · apply Subgraph.vertexSet_mono
          intro v hv
          exact hsub hv
      · exact hdeg
    have hcard : (Mx ∩ E(H)).encard ≤ V(H).encard / 2 := by
      apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
      have hsum : ∑ v in V(H), (Mx ∩ E(G, v)).encard = 2 * (Mx ∩ E(H)).encard := by
        apply Eq.symm
        apply Eq.symm
        apply Finset.sum_encard_inter_eq_two_mul_encard
        · intro v hv
          exact hmatch.subsingleton_inc v
        · intro e he
          obtain ⟨u, v, hu, hv, rfl⟩ := G.mem_edgeSet.mp (Set.inter_subset_right _ _ he)
          exact ⟨u, hu, v, hv⟩
      have hle : ∑ v in V(H), (Mx ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ V(H).encard := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul
        intro v hv
        have hle' : (Mx ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ 1 := hmatch.degree_le_one v
        exact_mod_cast hle'
      linarith
    have hmax : M.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hM
    have hmax' : Mx.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hMx
    have hsymm : (M ∆ Mx).encard = M.encard + Mx.encard - 2 * (M ∩ Mx).encard := by
      rw [symmDiff_encard, add_tsub_cancel_of_le]
      apply le_of_not_gt
      intro hgt
      have hgt' : M.encard < Mx.encard := by
        linarith
      exact lt_irrefl _ (by linarith [hM.max Mx hMx.toIsMatching])
    have hcomp' : ∀ H' : Graph α β, H'.IsCompOf (hM.toIsMatching.restrict₂ hMx.toIsMatching) → H'.IsCycleGraph := by
      intro H' hH'
      have hmaxdeg : (hM.toIsMatching.restrict₂ hMx.toIsMatching).MaxDegreeLE 2 := hM.toIsMatching.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hMx.toIsMatching
      have hpathorcycle : H'.IsPathGraph ∨ H'.IsCycleGraph := hH'.isPathGraph_or_isCycleGraph_of_maxDegreeLE hmaxdeg
      cases' hpathorcycle with hpath hcycle
      · exfalso
        have hpath' : H'.IsPathGraph := hpath
        have hends : ∃ u v, u ≠ v ∧ u ∈ V(H') ∧ v ∈ V(H') ∧ (u ∉ V(G, M) ∨ v ∉ V(G, M)) := by
          apply hpath.ends_of_pathGraph

        obtain ⟨u, v, huv, hu, hv, huv'⟩ := hends

        have hv' : v ∉ V(G, M) ∨ v ∉ V(G, Mx) := by

        · exact huM

    have hodd' : Odd V(H).encard := by
      have hmatchH : H.IsMatching (M ∩ E(H)) := by

          exact hVH''

    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hcomp.nonempty
    have hiness : G.inessential x := h x

    have hHx : H.IsCompOf G := hH
    have hHy : H.IsCompOf G := hH
    have hconn : H.Connected := hH.connected
    have hpath : ∃ P, H.IsPath P ∧ P.first = x ∧ P.last = y := by

      · exact hx
      · exact hy

    have hP' : G.IsPath P := hP.of_le hH.subgraph
    have hPalt : G.IsAltPath hM.toIsMatching P := by

            exact hnodup'
        have heM : e ∈ M ∨ f ∈ M := by
          apply Or.intro_left
          apply Set.mem_of_mem_inter_left
          apply Set.inter_subset_left
        exact heM
    have hPaug : G.IsAugPath hM.toIsMatching P := by
      apply G.IsAugPath.mk
      · exact hPalt
      · apply P.Nonempty.of_ne

        exact huv (by rw [hPfirst, hPlast])
      · exact hxM
      · exact hyM

    have hM'cd : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + 1 := hPaug.augment_encard
    have hM'notmax : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M := by
      intro hMmax
      have hM'le : (M ∆ E(P)).encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max (M ∆ E(P)) hM'
      linarith
    have hMmax : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM
    exact hM'notmax hMmax
  exact hxy

  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply hH.finite
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    apply hH.odd
  have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
  have hmatch : ∃ M_H, H.IsMaxMatching M_H := by
    apply exists_isMaxMatching
  obtain ⟨M_H, hM_H⟩ := hmatch
  have hsize : M_H.encard = ν(H) := by
    apply IsMaxMatching.encard
    exact hM_H
  have hcover : V(H, M_H).encard = 2 * ν(H) := by
    sorry
  have hnotcover : V(H, M_H) ≠ V(H) := by
    intro hcover'
    have hencard : V(H).encard = 2 * ν(H) := by
      rw [← hcover', hcover]
    have hodd' : Even V(H).encard := by
      rw [hencard]
      apply even_mul
    contradiction
  have hexist : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(H, M_H) := by
    apply Set.exists_of_ssubset
    exact Set.ssubset_iff_subset_ne.mpr ⟨by rfl, hnotcover⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hexist
  have hunique : ∀ y, y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(H, M_H) → y = x := by
    sorry
  refine ⟨x, hx.1, ?_, hunique⟩
  intro y hy
  have hy' : y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) := by
    refine ⟨hy.1, ?_⟩
    intro hmy
    have hmy' : y ∈ V(H, M) := by
      apply Set.mem_of_mem_inter_left
      exact hmy
    have hmy'' : y ∈ V(H, M_H) := by
      sorry
    contradiction
  exact hy'.2

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Classical.indefiniteDescription
    exact ⟨∅, by infer_instance⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply hH.finite
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
    have hmatch : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∃ M', G.IsMaxMatching M' ∧ x ∉ V(G, M') := by
      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hx'⟩ := h x
      exact ⟨M', hM', hx'⟩
    have hrk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
      have hser : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
        intro x hx y hy hxy
        have hadj : G.Adj x y := by
          apply hH.connected.adj_of_mem hx hy hxy
        exact matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hadj
      have hnt : V(H).Nontrivial := by
        obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
        obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := hH.exists_ne hx
        exact ⟨x, hx, y, hy, hxy⟩
      rw [← Nat.cast_inj, ← Nat.cast_sub, ← Nat.cast_one]
      simp_all [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, Matroid.eRank]
      rw [fooA V(H) (by simp [hH.subset]) hnt hser]
      simp [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, Matroid.eRank]
    rw [hrk]
    have hencard : V(H).encard ≠ 0 := by
      intro hzero
      rw [hzero] at hfin
      exact hfin.encard_eq_zero.mp hzero
    omega
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    intro hcontra
    have hsub : V(H) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      intro x hx
      exact (hcontra x hx).elim
    have hmatch : G.IsMatchable V(H) := by
      exact ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, hsub⟩
    have hrk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) = V(H).encard := by
      simp [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, Matroid.eRank]
      use V(H)
      exact ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, hsub⟩
    rw [hrk] at hodd
    omega
  obtain ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩ := hex
  refine ⟨x, hx, hx', fun y hy hy' ↦ ?_⟩
  have heq : x = y := by
    have hmatchx : ∃ Mx, G.IsMaxMatching Mx ∧ x ∉ V(G, Mx) := h x
    have hmatchy : ∃ My, G.IsMaxMatching My ∧ y ∉ V(G, My) := h y
    have hMx : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM
    have hMy : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM
    have hencardx : M.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hM
    have hencardy : M.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hM
    have hVx : x ∉ V(G, M) := hx'
    have hVy : y ∉ V(G, M) := hy'
    have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
    have hconn : H.Connected := hH.connected
    have hpath : ∃ P, H.IsPath P ∧ P.first = x ∧ P.last = y := by
      apply hconn.exists_path hx hy
    obtain ⟨P, hP, hfirst, hlast⟩ := hpath
    have hP' : G.IsPath P := hH.path_is_path hP
    have hP'' : G.IsAltPath hM.toIsMatching P := by
      apply IsAltPath.of_path_of_max_degree_le_two hM.toIsMatching hM'.toIsMatching
      · apply hP'
      · apply IsMatching.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hM.toIsMatching hM'.toIsMatching
    have haug : G.IsAugPath hM.toIsMatching P := by
      refine ⟨hP'', P.nonempty_of_length_pos ?_, hVx, hVy⟩
      rw [← hfirst, ← hlast]
      apply WList.nonempty_of_mem_first_last hx hy
    have hencard' : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + 1 := IsAugPath.augment_encard haug
    have hcontradiction : M.encard < (M ∆ E(P)).encard := by
      rw [hencard']
      omega
    have hnotmax : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M := by
      intro hmax
      have hle : (M ∆ E(P)).encard ≤ M.encard := hmax.max _ (IsAugPath.augment haug)
      omega
    contradiction
  exact heq

have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Classical.choose_spec
    exact Classical.axiomOfChoice (fun _ ↦ Classical.em _)
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    sorry
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    sorry
  have hun : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) → y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) → x = y := by
    sorry
  exact exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique hex hun

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Classical.indefiniteDescription
    exact ⟨∅, by infer_instance⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    sorry
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    sorry
  obtain ⟨x, hxV, hxM⟩ := hex
  refine ⟨x, hxV, hxM, fun y hyV hyM ↦ ?_⟩
  sorry

have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Exists.intro (Classical.choose (by
      apply Classical.em
      intro h'
      exact ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff]⟩))
    apply Classical.choose_spec
    apply Classical.em
    intro h'
    exact ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff]⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply hH.finite
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    have hx : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) := by
      apply Set.nonempty_of_mem
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
      exact hx
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hx
    have hiness : G.inessential x := h x
    obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hxMx⟩ := hiness
    have heq : Mx.encard = ν(G) := by
      apply IsMaxMatching.encard
      exact hMx
    rw [← heq]
    sorry
  sorry

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  refine ⟨Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α)), ?_⟩
  intro H hH
  have hcomp := hH
  sorry

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  refine ⟨Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α)), ?_⟩
  intro H hH
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))

    apply hH.finite
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    apply hH.odd
  sorry

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Classical.choose_spec
    exact Classical.em (∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M)
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hcomp : H.IsCompOf G := hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    sorry
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    sorry
  have hun : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) → y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) → x = y := by
    sorry
  exact ExistsUnique.intro' hex hun

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  refine ⟨Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α)), ?_⟩
  intro H hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply Set.Finite.subset (G.vertexSet_finite_of_edgeFinite H hH)
    exact hH.subset
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))) := by
    sorry
  have hun : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))) →
      y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))) → x = y := by
    sorry
  exact exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique hex hun

have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply exists_isMaxMatching
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply hH.finite
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    apply hH.odd
  have hmatch : ∃ M_H, (G ↾ V(H)).IsMaxMatching M_H := by
    apply exists_isMaxMatching
  obtain ⟨M_H, hM_H⟩ := hmatch
  use Classical.choose (h (Classical.choose (hodd.exists_odd)))
  sorry

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  refine ⟨Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α)), ?_⟩
  intro H hH
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    apply Set.Finite.subset (G.vertexSet_finite_of_edgeFinite ?_)
    · apply hH.vertex_subset
    · infer_instance
  sorry

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply sSup_mem_of_isMax
    · exact Set.nonempty_of_mem ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff]⟩
    · exact fun _ _ ↦ le_rfl
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    sorry
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    sorry
  have hun : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) → y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) → x = y := by
    sorry
  exact exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique hex hun

have hM := Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  have hM' := Classical.choose_spec (h (Classical.arbitrary α))
  refine ⟨Classical.choose (h (Classical.arbitrary α)), ?_⟩
  intro H hH
  have hcomp := hH
  sorry

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    apply Exists.intro (Classical.choose (by
      apply Classical.em (Nonempty (G.IsMaxMatching))))
    exact Classical.choose_spec (by
      apply Classical.em (Nonempty (G.IsMaxMatching)))
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hcomp : H.IsConnected := hH.isConnected
  have hfin : V(H).Finite := by
    sorry
  have hodd : Odd V(H).encard := by
    sorry
  have hex : ∃ x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
    sorry
  have hun : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) → y ∈ V(H) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) → x = y := by
    sorry
  exact exists_unique_of_exists_of_unique hex hun
